title: RC Cobblemon
description: The easiest and fastest way to install the latest fabric Cobblemon! This Pack also provides a server to offer the best multiplayer experience.
body:
![RC Cobblemon Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f943540eb3aee3abb010d7c9d50d9adb1028271.jpeg) *The easiest way to play Cobblemon — optimized, good-looking, and ready to go.* ---
You boot up the pack, you're in. No digging through mod lists, no config headaches, no wondering why your game runs like a slideshow. Just Cobblemon — the way it should feel. RC Cobblemon was built around our multiplayer server, but it's grown into something worth playing on its own. We took the latest **Cobblemon 1.7.3** on **Fabric 1.21.1** and wrapped it in everything we think makes the experience better — performance, visuals, quality of life, the works. Whether you're joining our server or starting your own world, this is Cobblemon without the hassle.
--- What's Inside

- 🔴 **Cobblemon 1.7.3** — catch, battle, and explore with fully 3D Pokémon in your world - 🏃 **Infinite Stamina** — no more stopping every five seconds while exploring - 🗺️ **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** — always know where you are and where you've been - 🔍 **EMI** — full recipe and item browser with enchanting, ore, and profession support - 📷 **Zoomify** — zoom in on anything, anytime - 🎯 **Dynamic Crosshair** — crosshair changes based on what you're looking at - 🎒 **Shulker Box Tooltips** — peek inside without opening them - ✨ **Enchantment Descriptions** — actually know what your enchantments do - 🛠️ **Crafting Tweaks** — rotate, balance, and clear crafting grids easily - 🎮 **Better Third Person** — smooth third-person camera that doesn't fight you
--- Looks Good, Runs Better

Performance and visuals shouldn't be a tradeoff. We packed in the full optimization stack so you can run shaders without your PC catching fire. - 🚀 **Sodium + Sodium Extra** — the best rendering engine for Fabric, period - 🪶 **Lithium** — server and game logic optimizations - 🌐 **Krypton** — network stack improvements - 🧠 **FerriteCore** — memory usage reduction - ⚡ **ImmediatelyFast** — UI and entity rendering speedups - 👁️ **Entity Culling + Leaf Culling** — don't render what you can't see - 🎨 **Iris Shaders** — full shader support, **Complementary Reimagined** included - 🍂 **Falling Leaves, Particle Rain, Wakes, Visuality** — subtle particles that bring the world to life - 💡 **Dynamic Lighting** — torches light up in your hand - 🌿 **Better Leaves** — thicker, fuller foliage - 🫧 **Make Bubbles Pop** — because it's the little things - 🧍 **Not Enough Animations** — your character actually looks alive - 🐾 **Presence Footsteps** — every block sounds different underfoot
--- Server Ready

Our community server is **pre-configured** in the server list — install the pack and you're one click away from playing with everyone else. No IP copying, no manual setup. But if you just want a solid singleplayer Cobblemon experience, this works perfectly for that too.
--- FAQ

> **Q: Do I need to join the server to use this pack?** > > **A:** Nope. Works great in singleplayer or on any server. The RC server is just pre-added for convenience. > **Q: Will this run on my PC?** > > **A:** We've included a full performance optimization stack (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, etc.) so it should run well even on mid-range hardware. Shaders are optional if you need extra frames. > **Q: Can I add my own mods?** > > **A:** Go for it — just keep in mind we can't guarantee compatibility with anything outside the pack. > **Q: Where can I get help or report bugs?** > > **A:** Join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/rcgamers) and let us know.
---
